nodes.label: List spaces on the Hub, or files in a space repo.      When called with no argum

Search spaces on the Hub using semantic search.

Update the settings of a Space.
Fetch the run or build logs of a Space.      By default, prints currently availa
Hot-reload any Python file of a Space without a full rebuild + restart.      ⚠ T
List volumes mounted in a Space.
Remove all volumes from a Space.
